message:
feat(tests): add 31 new tests for trace integrity module (bd-1kv3k)

Cover Display for all 11 IntegrityIssue variants, severity classification
(fatal vs error), IssueSeverity ordering, VerificationOptions builders
and preset values (default/quick/strict), VerificationResult queries
(safe_event_count, fatal_issues iterator, is_partially_usable edge
cases), missing file handling, strict monotonic verification, and quick
verification event skipping.

Coverage: 12 → 43 tests for src/trace/integrity.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
